title: Christmas Water Lantern Kannino Train Shaped Snow Globe with Water Swirling Glitter Xmas Light-Up Snow Globe Lantern for Christmas Home Decor Tabletop Decorative Gifts - Batteries Not Included (Santa)
features: 【Light Up Your Christmas】 This train-shaped snow globe lantern has an exquisite and unique appearance, which leaves a deep impression at first glance. The Christmas-themed Santa Claus and sequined lanterns are bright and colorful under the warm water light. They will add fun to your Christmas and create a fairy-tale world-like Christmas atmosphere.

【Elaborate Design】 The Christmas water lantern are made of high-quality plastic and resin, and the exterior adopts a unique Brushed bronze train design, Together with the Santa Claus statue, it creates a retro and warm style. When the lantern is turned on, the lighted snow globe can create a dazzling light and create unforgettable memories for you.

【Battery-Powered】 This Christmas train snow globel lantern is powered by 2 AAA batteries (not included), It is easy to operate and has no fire hazard. Just turn on the switch button at the bottom, and the warm light with flashing sequins and Santa Claus will appear immediately, Bring the joy of Christmas. And it can be used safely and repeatedly in your room.

【Unique Decorations】 Christmas lanterns are very suitable for creating a warm and comfortable atmosphere, and can be placed on your dining table, fireplace, living room, bedroom, Christmas tree supplement, etc. The snow globe lanterns at night are fascinating, and the lights are warm and dreamy. Not only for home decoration, but also for cafe/shop/restaurant/bookstore/party/bar or wherever you want.

【Perfect Gift】 The beautiful glittering snow globe lantern is a great gift choice, you can give it to your family/friends/lovers and partners to create a warm and vivid scene for them at Christmas. It can also be used as a small night light for children, allowing the warm light to accompany them all night.

Snow globe lanterns are very suitable for creating a warm and comfortable atmosphere. They can be placed at the entrance or in any room to add luster to your home. 2. As a perfect gift for Christmas, you can give it to your family members/friends/neighbors/colleagues and send them the most sincere holiday wishes.
